Product and Service Risks: Quality or reliability problems in software products and services
Supply Chain and Manufacturing: Price reductions resulting in inventory adjustments
Intellectual Property: Legal changes decreasing the value of intellectual property
Third-party claims of intellectual property infringement
Technology and Cybersecurity: Security of our products, services, devices, and customers' data
Human Resources: Ability to attract and retain talented employees
Operational Risks: Catastrophic events or geopolitical conditions disrupting business
Legal and Litigation: Government litigation and regulatory activity relating to competition rules
Strategic Risks: Increasing focus on cloud-based services presents execution and competitive risks
Development of the IoT presents security, privacy, and execution risks
Issues in the use of AI in our offerings may result in reputational harm or liability
Third-Party Risks: Abuse of our platforms may harm our reputation or user engagement
new_risk: Data Handling and Privacy: Disclosure and misuse of personal data could result in liability and harm our reputation
Laws and regulations relating to the handling of personal data may impede the adoption of our services or result in increased costs, legal claims, fines against us, or reputational damage
We may not be able to protect information in our products and services from use by others
new_risk: Global Operations and Economic: Our global business exposes us to operational and economic risks
Our business with government customers may present additional uncertainties
Adverse economic or market conditions may harm our business
new_risk: Environmental and Climate Risk: Long-term effects of climate change on the global economy and the IT industry
Environmental regulations or changes in the supply, demand or available sources of energy or other resources
